features.name: GitHub repo
features.desc: Create github.com/fournit/sorriva. Initialize with README, .gitignore, branch protection on main. Push initial scaffold from /var/app/sorriva/.

features.name: sessions.json + roadmap-data.json initialized
features.desc: Initialize velocity tracking and roadmap files. sessions.json carries forward entries from planning sessions.

features.name: Xcode project + Expo Bare setup
features.desc: Initialize React Native Expo Bare project at ~/projects/sorriva-app with SDK 57. iOS and iPadOS targets. Bundle ID app.sorriva.ios. supportsTablet: true. Xcode workspace generated via prebuild. tvOS deferred to Phase 6.

features.name: Navigation shell — tab bar + stubbed screens
features.desc: Tab bar wired: Library, Deriva, Zones, Stats. Four screen stubs — no content yet, just renders on iPhone Simulator. Establishes the navigation skeleton all UI phases build on.

features.name: On-device SQLite schema
features.desc: Core on-device SQLite schema for the music graph: households, users, tracks, albums, artists, sources, streaming_credentials, play_history, preferences, queue. user_id FK on all behavioral records. household_id on library records. Commercial-ready from day one.

features.name: Household + member profile model
features.desc: Household owns the local library and Sorriva subscription. Members each have their own streaming OAuth credentials (Spotify, Apple Music, Qobuz), listening history, favorites, and Deriva learning. Apple Sign-In for household owner auth. One subscription per household (Roon model). Commercial auth (Clerk/Auth0) deferred — Apple Sign-In covers personal build.

features.name: Minimal Flask backend — hub + health only
features.desc: Sorriva is a pure App Store product — no server-side app logic. Flask backend serves the hub only: /api/health endpoint with DB ping, hub monitoring, docs/web asset serving. No app API routes. All app logic lives in the Expo project.

features.name: App Store Connect records
features.desc: Create app record for iOS/iPadOS in App Store Connect. Bundle ID: app.sorriva.ios. Configure TestFlight for internal testing. Required before first device build — not blocking Simulator development.

features.name: Library scanner — SMB + local + USB-C
features.desc: Scan music library from three source types: NAS via SMB share, local device storage, and external USB-C drive (iPadOS 13+ Files app access). Index files into on-device SQLite schema. Formats: FLAC, ALAC, MP3, AAC, WAV, AIFF.

features.name: Basic local file playback
features.desc: Play indexed local files on device via AVFoundation. Play, pause, skip, seek, volume. No zones yet — device speaker only. Foundation for all playback features.

features.name: Unified music graph data model
features.desc: Core Track entity with source array (local, Spotify, Apple Music, Qobuz). One track identity across all sources. Source resolved at playback time. Schema supports user_id, play count, last played, playlist membership.

features.name: MusicBrainz MBID matching
features.desc: Assign canonical MusicBrainz IDs to local library tracks. Acoustic fingerprinting via AcoustID for files without embedded IDs. Cross-platform ID mapping to bridge Spotify IDs and Apple Music IDs. 90%+ match rate target; flag low-confidence matches for manual review.

features.name: Cross-source de-duplication
features.desc: Identify tracks available in multiple sources (local + Spotify + Apple Music). Present as single track entry with source list. Available on X sources indicator. User configures preferred source order in settings.

features.name: Context-aware source resolution
features.desc: At playback time: detect home network vs away. Home = local FLAC preferred, fallback to Apple Music then Spotify. Away = Apple Music then Spotify. Transparent to user — it just plays. Network detection uses local IP range check.

features.name: Metadata pipeline — album art
features.desc: Fetch and cache hi-res album art for all library tracks. Multiple sizes (thumbnail, full, backdrop). Served from local cache. Sources: embedded file tags, MusicBrainz Cover Art Archive, iTunes Search API fallback.

features.name: Metadata pipeline — bio, reviews, credits
features.desc: Artist biography (Last.fm primary, Discogs fallback). Album reviews (Pitchfork, AllMusic, RateYourMusic). Credits — producer, engineer, session musicians (MusicBrainz). Genre/tags (Last.fm + MusicBrainz). Related artists.

features.name: Source badge system
features.desc: Visual source attribution on every track cell and now playing screen. Spotify green, Apple Music gradient, Qobuz blue, local FLAC pill. Source is subordinate UI — present for the curious, never the headline.

features.name: Play history + statistics tracking
features.desc: Log every play event: track, source, user_id, timestamp, duration played. Per-profile play count, last played date, total hours. Foundation for Deriva AI and annual wrap-up.

features.name: Spotify Connect integration
features.desc: In-app Spotify playback via Spotify Connect API. Sorriva controls playback; Spotify streams directly to device. No Spotify app UI shown. Premium required. Catalog search, library browse, playlist import. Per-profile OAuth credentials.

features.name: Apple Music — MusicKit integration
features.desc: In-app Apple Music playback via MusicKit framework. Full catalog search and streaming inside Sorriva UI. Apple Music developer entitlement required. Library sync from user's Apple Music library. Per-profile credentials.

features.name: Qobuz Connect integration
features.desc: In-app Qobuz hi-res streaming via Qobuz Connect API. Catalog search, library browse, hi-res quality selection. Per-profile credentials.

features.name: iHeartRadio — live radio stations
features.desc: Live radio station search and playback via iHeartRadio API. Station browse by genre/location.

features.name: Streaming service connection settings
features.desc: Settings screen for connecting/disconnecting streaming services per profile. OAuth flow per service. Shows connection status, account info, subscription tier. User configures preferred source order for context-aware resolution.

features.name: Unified device discovery
features.desc: Discover all audio endpoints on the local network: AirPlay 2 devices via mDNS/Bonjour, Sonos via local API, Bluesound via BluOS. Present as one unified zone list. No protocol awareness required from user. Sonos native groups and stereo pairs surface as single zones.

features.name: Sonos native group + stereo pair preservation
features.desc: Sonos hardware groups and stereo pairs are defined at firmware level and must be respected as-is. Sorriva discovers and treats them as single opaque zones. Never regroups or breaks Sonos native configuration.

features.name: AirPlay 2 multi-room streaming
features.desc: Simultaneous playback to multiple AirPlay 2 endpoints. Independent volume per zone. Latency-matched sync handled by AirPlay 2 protocol.

features.name: Saved zone groups
features.desc: User creates named zone groups combining any mix of AirPlay 2 endpoints (e.g. Downstairs, Party Mode). One tap to recall. Groups persist across sessions.

features.name: Ad-hoc zone groups
features.desc: Temporary zone groupings for the current session. Dissolve when session ends. Quick-create from zone list without naming or saving.

features.name: EQService abstraction layer
features.desc: Single EQ UI that translates to each device's native API. Sonos HTTP API: bass, treble, loudness, balance. BluOS API: tone controls. Plain AirPlay 2: volume only. New device type = new driver, UI unchanged.

features.name: Sonos local API control layer
features.desc: Sonos HTTP API integration: bass, treble, loudness, balance, Trueplay status read/write. Volume control. Parallel to AirPlay 2 audio delivery.

features.name: BluOS API control layer
features.desc: Bluesound BluOS HTTP API integration: EQ, tone controls, balance, device config. Volume control. Parallel to AirPlay 2 audio delivery.

features.name: Per-zone and per-group volume control
features.desc: Independent volume control for each zone and each saved group via AirPlay 2 protocol, supplemented by device native API where available.

features.name: Library screen — album grid + list
features.desc: Unified album grid and list toggle. Shows local library and streaming service libraries merged. Source badges on all entries. Filter by genre, decade, source, unplayed. Sort by title, year, date added, play count. Search across all sources.

features.name: Now Playing screen
features.desc: Full album art, track info, scrub bar, volume, source badge (subordinate), zone indicator. Content tabs: Info / Review / Credits / Artist. Queue peek. AirPlay 2 zone selector. Like/favorite action.

features.name: Artist screen
features.desc: Artist bio, stats, full discography across all sources, related artists rail. Albums sorted by year. Play all and Shuffle actions. Library gap indicator (X of N albums in library).

features.name: Album screen
features.desc: Album art, track list with play counts, album review, credits panel, source availability per track.

features.name: Zones panel
features.desc: Unified device list: all AirPlay 2 endpoints, Sonos zones, Bluesound zones in one list. Saved group recall. Ad-hoc group creation. Per-zone EQ panel. Volume controls. Active zone indicator.

features.name: Play queue
features.desc: Current queue with drag-to-reorder. Play next vs add to end. Save queue as playlist. Clear queue. Session history — view and replay past sessions.

features.name: Universal search
features.desc: Single search across local library, Spotify catalog, Apple Music catalog, Qobuz catalog. Results grouped by source. Instant local results; streaming results load progressively.

features.name: Favorites + playlists
features.desc: Favorite tracks, albums, artists per profile. User-created playlists — add from any source. Playlist detail with mixed-source track list and source badges.

features.name: Settings screen
features.desc: Library source configuration (SMB paths, local, USB-C). Streaming service connections per profile. Household profile management. Preferred source order. Network home detection config. Offline download management.

features.name: Offline downloads — owned music
features.desc: Mark albums, playlists, or tracks as available offline. Sorriva downloads from local library to device storage. Streaming service downloads remain DRM-sandboxed — accepted limitation.

features.name: Apple TV — cinematic now playing
features.desc: Full-bleed album art backdrop, track info overlay, source badge, zone status. Focus ring navigation. Playing / Art / Info / Review / Credits / Artist tabs. Lean-back optimized.

features.name: Apple TV — library browse
features.desc: Poster grid with focus-ring navigation optimized for 10-foot experience. Filter rail: genre, decade, source, unplayed. Sort control. Recently Added and Continue Listening rails.

features.name: Apple TV — universal search
features.desc: On-screen keyboard search across all sources. Results grouped clearly. Optimized for remote navigation.

features.name: Apple TV — zone control
features.desc: Zone selector overlay during playback. Saved group recall. Volume per zone. AirPlay 2 target management from Apple TV.

features.name: Apple TV — Deriva AI prompt entry
features.desc: Natural language prompt entry on Apple TV home screen. On-screen keyboard or iPhone/iPad as keyboard via Continuity. Returns curated shortlist with one-line reasoning per pick.

features.name: Apple TV — home screen
features.desc: Continue Listening rail. Recently Added rail. Deriva suggestion strip. Quick access to saved zone groups. Source status indicators.

features.name: iPhone as Apple TV remote
features.desc: iPhone and iPad act as full remote controllers for Apple TV Sorriva session. Play/pause/skip, volume, zone switching, queue management — all from phone while Apple TV displays now playing.

features.name: Deriva — mood/context AI playlists
features.desc: Natural language playlist generation from full music graph. Examples: Sunday Morning Coffee, Late Night Drive, Dinner Party. Draws from local library and all connected streaming services. Profile-aware. Returns playlist with reasoning.

features.name: Deriva — music discovery
features.desc: Analyzes most played tracks, artists, genres across all sources. Music just like this from any artist or track. Gateway albums. Deep cuts surfacing per artist. Sources: MusicBrainz + Last.fm similarity APIs.

features.name: Deriva — skip pattern learning
features.desc: Track skips and abandons across all sources per profile. Learn genre, era, style avoidance patterns. Stop including patterns that consistently get skipped. Improve playlist and auto-play quality over time.

features.name: Deriva — library rediscovery
features.desc: Surface forgotten and unplayed albums. Cross-reference with listening patterns to find likely matches. Scheduled rediscovery suggestions.

features.name: Auto Play
features.desc: Continuous play seeded from currently playing track. Tightness dial: strict (same genre/era) to open (anything goes). Pulls from local library and streaming services. Powered by Last.fm similar tracks API + Deriva pattern learning.

features.name: Deriva — contextual soft signals
features.desc: Time-of-day and seasonal awareness as soft signals for playlist generation. Optional weather API integration. Signals inform but don't hard-filter.

features.name: Vinyl library — collection management
features.desc: Separate vinyl collection module. Manual entry or barcode scan. Discogs API for metadata (pressing info, matrix numbers, label variants). Fields: title, artist, label, catalog number, pressing, year, format (LP/Single/EP/78), condition (Goldmine scale), purchase price/date. Collection browser, value estimator (Discogs marketplace), wantlist, duplicates detection. Export CSV/PDF for insurance.

features.name: Deriva — vinyl recommendations
features.desc: Cross-reference digital listening patterns against vinyl collection. Based on your digital listening, here are records you should own.

features.name: Billboard archive
features.desc: Annual Top 100 every year from 1955 to present. Browse by year or decade. Each entry resolves to best available source. You own X of the [year] Top 100 stat per year.

features.name: Shazam integration
features.desc: Read Shazam library and generate playlist. Resolve each tag to local library then subscribed service then fallback. Best-effort write-back sync via Apple's limited Shazam API.

features.name: Playback statistics
features.desc: Albums, tracks, artists, genres, decades — all ranked by play count across all sources and profiles. Total hours played. Session history. Annual wrap-up.

features.name: iOS widgets
features.desc: Now Playing widget (art, track, controls). Zone selector widget. Quick play favorites widget. Via react-native-widget-extension.

features.name: Apple CarPlay
features.desc: Playback control while driving. Requires Apple CarPlay entitlement. Browse recently played, favorites, Deriva playlists. Play/pause/skip/volume only.

features.name: Mac library bridge
features.desc: Optional Mac menu bar agent. Scans attached drives/NAS. Exposes local library remotely via cloud backend relay. Enables full library access anywhere without VPN.

features.name: Smart playlists
features.desc: Rules-based auto-generated playlists: genre + decade + unplayed + minimum play count + source combinations. Auto-update as library grows.

features.name: watchOS app
features.desc: Basic playback controls and Now Playing display on Apple Watch. Play/pause/skip/volume. Complications for current track.

features.name: SiriusXM integration
features.desc: Satellite radio via sxm-player library. Subscription required. Legal posture for personal use TBD. Deferred pending decision.
